doc_title: Illinois Forcible Entry and Detainer Act — 5-Day Notice
label: partial
reason: The core statutory language of 735 ILCS 5/9-209 appears largely accurate, but the email service clause and procedural framing are editorial additions not found in the official codified text.
response_turn1:
